summary: Tested Polythene Management feature for Stock Entry Executives (SEE = 'executive' role). All core features working correctly: role-based access, summary totals, filtering, read-only view for executives.
critical_code_review_comments: Role-based access correctly implemented: admin and executive can access /api/polythene/all, polythene_executive gets 403
Delete endpoint correctly restricts: admin can delete any, polythene_executive can delete own, executive cannot delete
Frontend correctly hides User filter dropdown for non-admin users (isAdmin check on line 213)
Frontend correctly hides delete buttons and Actions column for non-admin users (isAdmin check on lines 276, 305)
Summary totals (Total Add, Total Subtract, Net Polythene) correctly computed from filtered entries
Clear Filters button appears only when filters are active (hasActiveFilters check)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_EXEC (executive) and TEST_POLY_EXEC (polythene_executive) users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polythene Management feature fully tested. Executive users can access /polythene-management via direct URL or sidebar (under Inventory group). They see read-only view without delete buttons or User filter. Admin sees full view with delete buttons and User filter dropdown. 3 polythene entries exist in the system for testing.

admin_access_polythene_all.evidence: Backend test passed, returns list of polythene entries

executive_access_polythene_all.evidence: Backend test passed, returns same data as admin

admin_sees_delete_buttons.description: Admin sees delete buttons in Actions column
admin_sees_delete_buttons.evidence: Playwright test found 3 delete buttons for admin

executive_no_delete_buttons.description: Executive does NOT see delete buttons (read-only)
executive_no_delete_buttons.evidence: Playwright test confirmed 0 delete buttons for executive

executive_no_user_filter.description: Executive does NOT see User filter dropdown
executive_no_user_filter.evidence: Playwright test confirmed filter-user-select not visible

summary_totals_visible.description: Summary totals (Total Add, Total Subtract, Net Polythene) visible at top
summary_totals_visible.evidence: Both admin and executive see totals: +0.011 kg, -0.002 kg, +0.009 kg

filtering_updates_totals.description: Filtering by stamp/item updates the totals
filtering_updates_totals.evidence: STAMP 1 filter changed Total Add from +0.011 to +0.000 kg

clear_filters_button.description: Clear Filters button appears when filters active and clears all
clear_filters_button.evidence: Playwright test confirmed button appears and clears filters

sidebar_navigation.description: Polythene Mgmt visible in sidebar under Inventory group for executive
sidebar_navigation.evidence: Playwright test confirmed link visible and navigable
